headline: Principal Leadership Quality Varies Widely Across States
context: MOE's competency assessment of 2,400 school principals found significant variation in management and pedagogical leadership.

cards.big: Only 38% of school principals rated proficient or above in 2025 MOE competency assessment
cards.sub: Principal quality is the second strongest school-level predictor of student outcomes

cards.big: Average principal appointment is based on seniority with minimum 25 years teaching service
cards.sub: Experience-based selection does not evaluate leadership capability or vision

cards.big: Kelantan and Terengganu schools show 22% lower principal competency scores than KL and Penang
cards.sub: Geographic quality variation tracks with student achievement patterns across states

cards.big: Ontario's principal qualification program requires 120 hours of leadership training before appointment
cards.sub: Structured preparation ensures minimum leadership competency at point of appointment

cards.big: Promoting the longest-serving teacher does not guarantee the best school leader
Should principal appointments require passing a leadership qualification program first
